title: TopBuild Historical Revenue Trends 2014-2026
text:
TopBuild Corp. Historical Revenue and Financial Performance:

Long-term Growth Trajectory:
TopBuild has demonstrated sustained revenue growth over the past 12+ years, with significant acceleration since 2020. The company's annual revenue for 2022 was $5.01 billion, representing a 43.67% increase from 2021, highlighting the company's aggressive acquisition strategy.

Post-Spin-Off Performance (2015-Present):
Since the spin-off in 2015, TopBuild has completed 45 acquisitions, transforming itself from a regional installer into a national leader in insulation installation and specialty distribution. This M&A-driven growth strategy has been the primary driver of revenue expansion.

Segment Contribution:
The Installation Services segment and Specialty Distribution segment have both grown substantially, with Installation Services providing the bulk of earnings while Specialty Distribution offers counter-cyclical exposure and recurring maintenance revenue.

Earnings Growth:
TopBuild's 2021 annual EPS of $9.78 represented a 31.81% increase from 2020, demonstrating strong operational leverage and margin expansion alongside revenue growth.

Future Outlook:
Management has a long-term outlook targeting $9B-$10B in sales and $1.7B-$2B EBITDA by 2030, suggesting continued growth at a more normalized pace following recent years of aggressive M&A.
